subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá and servants of the Most Glorious Beauty! How blessed, how blessed that ye have drunk this brimming cup from the hand of the mystic Cupbearer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ياران عبدالبهآء و بندگان جمال ابهی خوشا خوشا که اين جام سرشار را از دست ساقی اسرار نوشيديد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @war and peace, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @spiritual transformation, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
